studyName: Consortium of Investigators of Modifiers of BRCA1/2 (CIMBA)

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject IDs, country of residence, mutated gene, censoring variable and age for use in breast cancer analysis and ovarian cancer analysis, estrogen receptor status, and sample of European or non-European origin.

variables.name: ERstatus
variables.description: Estrogen Receptor (ER) status of breast cancer (if applicable)

variables.name: Non_CEU
variables.description: Indicates if sample is of non-European origin

variables.name: censage
variables.description: Censoring age for use in breast cancer analysis

variables.name: censvar
variables.description: Censoring variable for use in breast cancer analysis

variables.name: ovca_censage
variables.description: Censoring age for use in ovarian cancer analysis

variables.name: ovca_censvar
variables.description: Censoring variable for use in ovarian cancer analysis

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body site, analyte type, histological type, and tumor status.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample use.
The subject consent file includes subject IDs and consent information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC
